interpretation_mapping: The proposed formal predicate does not match the broader prose claim and must not be treated as proof of that prose.
formal_scope: Mismatch record only; the formal artifact cannot discharge the target prose claim.
limitations: semantic equivalence has not been established
consumer_requirements: do not cite as proof of the prose claim
route to UAT or human proof adequacy review
preserve failed attempt as evidence against overclaiming
downgrade_rule: If a mismatch is recorded, block promotion and route the claim to review.
residual_route: Route to proof adequacy review and claim-ledger residual tracking.
ledger_update: Escalate and block promotion because a semantic mismatch was recorded.
